policy.purpose: cash proxy CAGR uplift bypass audit input

scenario_sources.prices: Yahoo Adj Close research input; not an IBKR cash ledger or fund distribution statement
scenario_sources.cash_proxy_role: bypass audit substitution for SHV exposure only; not a production cash sweep instruction
scenario_sources.tax_and_distribution: handled by the research friction model where applicable; not entity-specific tax advice

short_history.SGOV: starts in 2020 and lacks 2008/2011/2015 full-cycle evidence
short_history.USFR: starts in 2014 and lacks 2008 crisis evidence
short_history.TFLO: starts in 2014 and lacks 2008 crisis evidence

not_covered: future ETF fee, structure, or index methodology changes

failure_boundary.production_use: cash proxy results are research-only and must not replace SHV in the production candidate without a separate approved audit
failure_boundary.missing_or_stale_distribution_data: do not infer tax-adjusted live carry from this snapshot
failure_boundary.stage95_missing_or_unavailable: cash proxy uplift cannot be used for live capital allocation
failure_boundary.live_execution_gate_enabled: cash proxy audit must remain disconnected from broker order submission
